missions.title: Physics and Measurement - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering SI units, fundamental units, derived units and more.

microtargets.title: SI units
mustKnowFacts: SI units is a fundamental subtopic of Physics and Measurement.
Crucial to understand the principles governing SI units for NEET.
commonTraps: Students often misinterpret SI units during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for SI units.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to SI units.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about SI units.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind SI units.
What is a common trap associated with SI units?
